summary: Iteration 15 Testing Complete - PLU Composite Scoring with Confidence Indicator. All 15 backend tests passed. Dynamic GPU scoring returns confidence=haute with prescriptions/infos. Static scoring returns confidence=basse (code-only) or moyenne (with regulation text or excluded zones). Frontend shows 3-dot confidence indicator in ParcelDetail and chatbot parcel cards.
passed_tests: GET /api/scoring/plu-dynamic?lon=4.94&lat=43.44 (Fos) returns confidence=haute with GPU dynamique detail
Unavailable location (ocean) returns gpu_source=unavailable with fallback
POST /api/scoring/plu with reglement_text returns confidence=moyenne or haute
POST /api/chat parcel search returns parcels with confidence in plu_scoring
Chatbot parcel cards show confidence dot indicator (green=haute, orange=moyenne, red=basse)
GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox returns parcels with plu_scoring.confidence field
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 150+ assets with postes HTB
Dashboard loads with map, layers panel, S3REnR summary
Layer toggles work including 400kV Future Fos→Jonq.
Chatbot opens and processes parcel search queries
Chatbot parcel cards show confidence indicator with colored dot
ParcelDetail panel has data-testid='plu-confidence' with 3-dot indicator
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses real GPU API (apicarto.ign.fr) for PLU data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested the NEW Confidence Indicator feature for PLU scoring. Key findings: 1) Dynamic GPU scoring (via /api/scoring/plu-dynamic) returns confidence='haute' when prescriptions/infos are available. 2) Static scoring returns confidence='basse' for code-only or 'moyenne' for excluded zones or when reglement_text is provided. 3) confidence_detail explains why the level was assigned (e.g., 'GPU dynamique : zone + 2 prescription(s) + 3 info(s)'). 4) Frontend ParcelDetail shows 3-dot indicator: green filled = haute, 2 orange = moyenne, 1 red = basse. 5) Chatbot parcel cards show confidence dot next to verdict. 6) Bbox parcels endpoint tries dynamic GPU first, falls back to static gracefully.

confidence_levels.haute: Dynamic GPU with prescriptions+infos OR static with adjustments+reglement
confidence_levels.moyenne: Dynamic GPU zone-only OR static with reglement OR excluded zones

confidence_detail_examples.haute: GPU dynamique : zone + 2 prescription(s) + 3 info(s) + analyse destination
confidence_detail_examples.basse: Scoring statique par code zone uniquement

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - uses real GPU API (Géoportail de l'Urbanisme) via apicarto.ign.fr
